title: [codereview-pass2.5] draft A.5 match-mapping proposal - check Rust/Python FieldDescriptor compatibility and residue size calc
description: Chunk 2 review. Rust rules.rs needs mapping: Vec or array in FieldDescriptor (currently missing full support per context.rs comment). Python has it. Size reduction: mapping index 3bits + lsb(64) for prefix = ~9B vs 32B. Verify no breaking change to existing rules. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ftlq
